/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libmotor_if__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_if__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/motor_if/srv/detail/motor_pos__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/install/lib:/workspace/build/motor_if: /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libmotor_if__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.24 /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/install/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
